taxonomy: Demorchis madagascariensis is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Demorchis madagascariensis is classified as a genus within the subtribe Orchidinae. The subtribe Orchidinae is part of the tribe Orchideae, which is a group of orchids commonly known as the 'old world orchids'. Demorchis madagascariensis's classification is further divided into various ranks, including kingdom and phylum.
